mapper.select: SELECT APPL_NUM , USER_NAME , FARM_NAME , APPL_ROLE , USER_EMAIL , BUSINESS_TEL , APPL_ADDR , REG_DATE , APPR_DATE , A.USER_ID FROM APPLICATION A INNER JOIN USERS U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT A.APPL_NUM , A.USER_ID , U.USER_NAME , U.USER_EMAIL , A.BUSINESS_TEL , A.APPL_ROLE , A.REG_DATE , A.APPR_DATE , CASE WHEN A.APPR_DATE IS NULL THEN '대기 중' ELSE '승인 완료' END AS STATUS FROM APPLICATION A INNER JOIN USERS U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID ORDER BY A.REG_DATE DESC

SELECT A.APPL_NUM , A.USER_ID , U.USER_NAME , U.USER_EMAIL , A.BUSINESS_TEL , A.APPL_ROLE , A.REG_DATE , A.APPR_DATE FROM APPLICATION A INNER JOIN USERS U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE U.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%') ORDER BY A.REG_DATE DESC
